attr.title: Rising Dusk
attr.desc: A 2D action platformer. Battle through the darkness and survive the rising dusk. Requires the original game files from Steam.
attr.inst: Purchase the game on Steam (App 848930). Run prepare_port.py (Windows: double-click prepare_port.bat; Linux/macOS: python3 prepare_port.py) then copy the contents of risingdusk_ready/ into ports/risingdusk/. Do NOT copy steam_api.dll — the port bundles an offline replacement.
